assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Repository Registry' section with a table listing both 'trustify-backend' (serena_backend) and 'trustify-ui' (serena_ui) as entries
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 20-25 contain '## Repository Registry' with a table listing '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |' and '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Jira Configuration' section with all 5 fields: Project key (TC), Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID (10142), Git Pull Request custom field (customfield_10875), GitHub Issue custom field (customfield_10747)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 27-33 contain '## Jira Configuration' with all 5 fields: 'Project key: TC', 'Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432', 'Feature issue type ID: 10142', 'Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875', 'GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '## Code Intelligence' section that documents the mcp__<instance>__<tool> naming convention
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 35 contains '## Code Intelligence' and line 37 states 'Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: `mcp__<instance>__<tool>`.' with a concrete example on lines 42-46 using mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md contains a '### Limitations' subheading under Code Intelligence
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 48 contains '### Limitations' which appears after the '## Code Intelligence' section on line 35, making it a subheading under Code Intelligence.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md mentions discovering 2 Serena instances (serena_backend and serena_ui) from the MCP tool listing
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 7-10 under '## Discovered Serena Instances' lists: '1. **serena_backend** — discovered from MCP tools prefixed with `mcp__serena_backend__` (10 tools...)' and '2. **serena_ui** — discovered from MCP tools prefixed with `mcp__serena_ui__` (10 tools...)'. The source is identified as 'MCP tool listing' on line 5.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates all sections were newly added (no preserved entries since this is a greenfield setup)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md lines 13-14 state 'The following sections were added as a new `# Project Configuration` block appended to the end of the file'. Lines 17, 27, and 34 label each section as '(new)': 'Repository Registry (new)', 'Jira Configuration (new)', 'Code Intelligence (new)'. Lines 42-44 state 'Nothing was removed. The setup skill is incremental and never removes existing entries.' The original file had no Project Configuration section (it was a greenfield setup), so all configuration sections were newly added.

assertion_results.text: The Repository Registry table contains columns: Repository, Role, Serena Instance, Path — matching project-config.template.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 22 shows '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |' which exactly matches the template at project-config.template.md line 5 '| Repository | Role | Serena Instance | Path |'.
